zh.lifeSummary: 當William Sargent於1435年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓時，他的父親Sidney James Edwin Sargent27歲，母親Eliza Braybrook32歲。他於1465年與Olive Jane Morgan在英國英格蘭藍卡爾其皮三結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1488年7月10日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾易沙安。

nameMeanings.name: Sargent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status or occupational name from Middle English sergeaunt ‘servant’ (Old French sergent, serjant). The surname probably originated for the most part in this sense, but the word also developed a number of more specialized meanings in the medieval period, including ‘tenant by military service below the rank of knight’. It was also used for a variety of administrative and legal offices, which may have contributed to the development of the surname. The sense ‘non-commissioned officer’ did not arise until the 16th century. Compare Sergent .

History: William Sargent (1624–1717) came to Gloucester, MA, from Devon, England before 1678. Many of his descendants distinguished themselves in the civil and military affairs of the colonies and some in literary or artistic paths, notably the portrait painter John Singer Sargent (1856–1925).

variants.name: Sergent
meanings: French: status or occupational name from Old French sergent, serjant ‘servant’ (see Sargent ).
Americanized form of Jewish (from Poland) Sierżant: artificial name meaning ‘sergeant’ (senior noncommissioned officer in the Polish infantry).

variants.name: Surgent
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Anatole, Emile.
Slovak: probably a nickname derived from Latin surgens, the present participle of surgo ‘to rise, to get up, to arise’.
French: probably a derivative of Surge, an occupational name from Old French surge ‘surgeon’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Sargent was born in 1435, in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Sidney James Edwin Sargent, was 27 and his mother, Eliza Braybrook, was 32. He married Olive Jane Morgan in 1465, in Chipping, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 10 July 1488, in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Isham, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Sargent est né en 1435, à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sidney James Edwin Sargent, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Eliza Braybrook, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Olive Jane Morgan en 1465, à Chipping, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 10 juillet 1488, à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Isham, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Sargent 1435 in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sidney James Edwin Sargent 27 und seine Mutter Eliza Braybrook 32. Er hat 1465 in Chipping, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Olive Jane Morgan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 10. Juli 1488 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Isham, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Sargent è nato il nel 1435 nel Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Sidney James Edwin Sargent, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Eliza Braybrook, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Olive Jane Morgan nel 1465, nel Chipping, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 10 luglio 1488, nel Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Isham, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: William Sargent(이)가 1435년 영국 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sidney James Edwin Sargent(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Eliza Braybrook(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 치핀그에서 Olive Jane Morgan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1488년 7월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 이샤에 묻혔다.
